hook.en: The secret to sounding natural in English
hook.zh: 聽起來像母語者的秘密

subtitles.zh: 我覺得最重要的事情是
這就是為什麼填充詞很重要

cards.usage: 口語中表示「很難/很學術的字」，比 difficult vocabulary 更自然
cards.example: You don't need to use big words to impress people.

cards.usage: 指 um, like, you know 等口語中用來停頓思考的詞
cards.example: Native speakers use filler words all the time without realizing it.
